assertions.expectation: Recommends increasing maxSurge for CPU pools (e.g., 10-20) to parallelize node replacements, with justification for the value
assertions.reason: Recommends maxSurge=8 for CPU pools, not 10-20 as specified in expectation

assertions.expectation: For GPU pools with fixed reservations: recommends increasing maxUnavailable (not maxSurge) as the primary lever since surge capacity is typically unavailable
assertions.reason: Correctly recommends maxSurge=0 and maxUnavailable=2 for GPU pools, explaining that surge capacity isn't available with fixed reservations

assertions.expectation: Advises checking and requesting increased compute quota before the upgrade for CPU pools
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking or requesting increased compute quota - only mentions scaling down workloads to free quota

assertions.expectation: Suggests staggering node pool upgrades or running non-conflicting pools in parallel
assertions.reason: Provides detailed commands for running all node pools in parallel using background processes

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE's auto-scale blue-green upgrade strategy as an option for GPU pools
assertions.reason: Specifically mentions and provides gcloud command for autoscaled blue-green strategy for GPU pools

assertions.expectation: Recommends expanding the maintenance window or splitting across multiple weekends
assertions.reason: Does not recommend expanding the window or splitting - instead focuses on making upgrades fit within the existing 8-hour window

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command for updating surge settings on each pool
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud container node-pools update commands for all pool types with surge/unavailable settings

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to track upgrade progress in real-time
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl and gcloud commands for monitoring node status and operations during upgrades
